error_signature: QR code does not appear in the execution results
title: QR code not rendering due to outdated Docker image
symptom: When trying to connect the Evolution API to n8n, the QR code fails to appear in the execution results.
applies_when: Using the Evolution API with n8n
Running on a local Docker setup
not_this_if: Using the latest Docker image for Evolution API
root_cause: The issue arises from using an outdated Docker image for the Evolution API, which is no longer maintained and does not support QR code rendering properly. The current image on Docker Hub has the necessary updates and fixes.
fix_steps: Locate the line that specifies the image: 'image: atendai/evolution-api:latest'.
Save the changes and restart your Docker containers.
agent_instruction: Update the Docker image for the Evolution API in your Compose file and restart the containers.
